title: Lung Cancer Detection using Hybrid Deep Learning and Explainable AI
description: A CT-scan classification system combining transfer learning, attention mechanisms, handcrafted texture features, and Grad-CAM explainability.
highlights: Validation accuracy around 98.9% and ROC-AUC around 0.997

title: EfficientUNetViT-Based Breast Tumor Segmentation
description: A deep learning pipeline for breast tumor segmentation from ultrasound images with model comparison and visual prediction analysis.
highlights: Evaluated Dice, IoU, precision, recall, specificity, and pixel accuracy

title: Automated Diabetic Retinopathy Screening with Swin Transformer
description: A transformer-based image classification pipeline for diabetic retinopathy severity grading using retinal fundus images.

title: Heart Sound Classification using Lightweight Deep Learning
description: An end-to-end pipeline for classifying phonocardiogram recordings as normal or abnormal using lightweight neural models.
highlights: Analyzed F1-score, inference time, and energy efficiency

title: AgroVision AI – Plant Disease Detection Application
description: A lightweight YOLO-based plant disease detection system for agricultural decision support.
highlights: Achieved high precision for real-time diagnosis

title: Outdoor Object Detection System for the Visually Impaired
description: A real-time outdoor obstacle detection and audio guidance system designed to support visually impaired users.

title: Anomalous Behavior Detection in Video Surveillance
description: A video anomaly detection pipeline using frame grouping, ResNet-50 feature extraction, and BiLSTM temporal modeling.

title: Acute Mountain Sickness Detection using Hyperdimensional Computing
description: A lightweight HDC-based binary classification pipeline for detecting Acute Mountain Sickness from physiological and contextual features.
highlights: Compared pseudo-random, Sobol, and Hadamard hypervectors
Feature preprocessing and mutual information analysis
